description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features a double garage on the left, a central walkway flanked by trees, and a main entrance with glass doors. The rear of the house includes a large patio area with a pergola and outdoor seating, as well as multiple glass doors leading inside. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a light gray color, with white trim around the windows and doors. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees, giving it a suburban feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a double garage, symmetrical windows, and a spacious rear patio with a pergola. The exterior is light gray with white trim, surrounded by a lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with glass doors, walkway, and a row of trees along the facade.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the start of the rear patio area with pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, pergola, multiple glass doors, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the garage, additional windows, and the continuation of the front walkway and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass double doors with a paved walkway, flanked by trees and minimal decorative elements.
